The '''''Lethisk''-class armed freighter''' was a large [[Realspace/Legends|space]] [[Transport/Legends|transport]] designed by [[Arakyd Industries/Legends|Arakyd Industries]] and used around the time of the [[Jedi Civil War]].

==History==
Even though intended by [[Arakyd Industries/Legends|Arakyd Industries]] to be the [[Starship/Legends|ship]] for general public, the ''Lethisk''-class [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] was too costly for any but the richest [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] citizens. Some of the ships have found their way into the hands of [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lords]] and [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]], but most were acquired by its target group: the wealthy families such as [[Sandral family]] from [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]], who kept their ship docked atop their [[Sandral estate|estate]].<ref name="k1">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref> More than 30 ships were sold at significant discount to [[Exchange]] crime bosses by a group of Arakyd employees, who were later sent to the [[Spice mines of Kessel/Legends|spice Mines of Kessel]] for that crime, including the Sector Executive of the [[Raioballo sector/Legends|Raioballo sector]].<ref name="kotorcg" />

==Behind the scenes==
This ship was first seen parked on top of the [[Sandral estate]] in ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''. The model seen here was reassembled from game source files, in which the ship was called an ''l-wing''. The official name of the class was established by the ''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]''.
